description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by dense landscaping, including a variety of tall trees, shrubs, and flowering bushes. The house itself is single-storied with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design, featuring large windows and a light-colored exterior. The property is enclosed by a thick perimeter of trees, providing privacy and a natural barrier from the street. A driveway leads up to the main entrance, which is partially visible through the foliage. The garden is well-maintained, with patches of green lawn and ornamental plants adding color and texture. The overall setting suggests a private, suburban residence with a focus on blending architecture with nature.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by dense trees and landscaped gardens, featuring large windows and a light exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance partially obscured by dense trees and shrubs, with the house nestled deep within the greenery.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the driveway leading to the house, with the perimeter of trees forming a natural enclosure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade of the bungalow, with more visible windows and a continuous line of trees behind.
description_view_3: Side view showing the driveway and a clear path through the trees, with the house set back from the street.
